title: Alchemika
description: An experimental magic datapack centered around alchemy. Ore processing, confectionery, chemical thrower, and more!
body:
![Small Alchemika banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a84557c39ddf7b60922a1a9ad4089cdc53295f6.png)

Alchemika is an extensive datapack centered around alchemical experimentation using the cauldron, taking inspiration from classical alchemy, chemistry, and mods like Thaumcraft, from the creator of [Undermagic](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/undermagic/), [Florcraft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/florcraft), and more.

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c422c39999a2e480f4cb253591d7334803af254_0.webp)

- Use your cauldron to manipulate 49 different substances; stir, heat, chill, scoop, and cast for all kinds of results
- Use acids to process raw metals at greater efficiency
- Experiment to find the best methods to make use of your formulas
- Create 16 new food items in the cauldron
- Manufacture new materials to create gear such as the Chemical Thrower
- Discover the notes of an Alchemist long passed to inform your experiments; complete in-game guidance via notes and advancements
- Unearth the Alchemist's forgotten laboratories; 2 new structures
- Phial racks and upgraded cauldrons to complete your laboratory
- Configurable and fully extensible via next-gen datapack tech
- Much more to come...

![Notes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b50cf752cd03103bdba1f60e867f07c292b25adf_0.webp)

[Join my Discord server](https://discord.gg/UYxhxDj) for discussion and any support needs. I love to hear what you have to say!

This pack uses the [Smithed Crafter library](https://smithed.net/packs/crafter) by rx, Nexus, and many others. You do not need a seperate download, it's included in the files. Thanks to them!

This pack wouldn't be possible without the unending support of [CreeperMagnet_](https://modrinth.com/datapack/myriad), rx, [Nexus](https://smithed.net/), Delta, the rest of the Smithed community, and all my friends who keep me going. A heartfelt thanks to all of them :)
